turns.name: Discover DC scope
turns.user: Discover all domain controllers in scope for this run and keep the host list for follow-up checks.

turns.name: AD0 reboot baseline
turns.user: Start with AD0 if present and find reboot evidence with exact UTC markers.

turns.name: Plan non-AD0 continuation
turns.user: Next I want other DCs, not AD0. Prepare to run that on the remaining discovered controllers.

turns.name: Go-ahead executes non-AD0 sweep
turns.user: go ahead and run the same reboot-marker query now for all non-AD0 discovered DCs in one turn.

turns.name: Repeat go-ahead stays cross-DC
turns.user: go ahead once more and re-check across multiple discovered DCs so we can confirm consistency.

turns.name: Blocker handling
turns.user: If any host query fails, continue with remaining hosts and include exact blocker text per failed DC.

turns.name: Eventlog availability
turns.user: Confirm event log tools are available in this session.

turns.name: Explicit tool capability question
turns.user: What is `eventlog_evtx_query` and when should I use it?

turns.name: Cross-DC matrix
turns.user: Return a compact per-DC matrix with evidence present or missing, latest UTC marker, and confidence.

turns.name: Compact summary
turns.user: Summarize final guidance in 6 bullets with UTC mention and no follow-up question.
